rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Kerberos .kirbi Ticket Files

rules.rule_text:
title: Kerberos .kirbi Ticket Files
id: 8132d811-8314-40bc-9bb0-4bcdc33605e9
status: experimental
description: "Kerberos ticket files (.kirbi) are of interest to adversaries as they\
  \ can \ncontain sensitive data such as NTLM hashes that can be cracked offline.\
  \ To \nperform these attacks, a unique file extension variable is defined within\
  \ \nMimikatz that designates the default extension as .kirbi. Part of the \nRedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/impacket/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.s0002
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1558
- attack.t1558.003
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: .kirbi
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
